Test name: CMFtap (ego 20 km/h, target 60 km/h)

Test Description

The scenario represents the VUT turning towards the driver side at an intersection with the AMT coming from the opposite direction and going straight within the intersection

  • Regulation or protocol: ASEAN NCAP
  • Ego speed: 20 km/h
  • Target speed: 60 km/h
